name: Ansh Madaan
education: B.Tech Computer Science, Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology (2023 - Present)

projects.name: Career Ops — AI-Powered Job Application Agent
projects.description: An end-to-end FastAPI job discovery platform aggregating opportunities from 40+ job portals and featuring an AI-driven resume intelligence pipeline using Gemini and Pydantic.

projects.name: EEG-based Schizophrenia Detection using Deep Learning
projects.description: A hybrid CNN-LSTM with attention achieving 97% accuracy on clinical EEG data, using Grad-CAM and Integrated Gradients to visualise model decisions.

projects.name: Voice Assisted Terminal
projects.description: A voice-controlled terminal translating natural language to shell commands using Google Generative AI, published on PyPI.

projects.name: Face Recognition-Based Chatbot Authentication System
projects.description: A secure face recognition authentication system using OpenCV, integrated with a TensorFlow NLP chatbot containing speech-to-text and TTS.
